title: SUNDAY SPECIAL
description: Darkness redux: Anurag Kashyap is back on the neo-noir trail with KennedyHandcrafted ByOur EditorsAfter over half a decade when he played the field with more mainstream subjects, Anurag Kashyap's new release, Kennedy, marks his return to exploring dark cinema.
